{{CargoRelic
|name=The Five Fortunes
|class_id=20066
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=When the gods descended together for the first time, they gave you this Relic as a souvenir. Whenever you get close, a familiar melody seems to ring in your ears:
A gentle waking call to the sleepy mind.
Open your eyes, we're one of a kind!
|fame=14
|art=9
|fth=19
|civ=29
|tech=19
|ss1=Snail AFFCT +5<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +1<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss2=Snail AFFCT +10<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +2<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss3=Snail AFFCT +15<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss4=Snail AFFCT +15<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss7=Snail AFFCT +15<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>Gods Descended: 30/30<br> (Awakened)
}}
